top_signals.title: US launches new round of strikes against Iran
top_signals.summary: The U.S. conducted a new wave of strikes against Iranian military sites on Wednesday after reimposing a naval blockade of the Islamic Republic's ports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests comment on a proposal to amend its requirements for banks to maintain anti-money laundering programs
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Air Force turns to cheaper cruise missiles it can buy by the thousands
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Air Force is turning to cruise missiles it can buy by the thousand, cheap enough to shoot many for less than it once cost to shoot one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump blasts New York AI data center moratorium, says state should change policy 'immediately'
top_signals.summary: New York became the first state in the U.S. to impose a ban of its kind when the governor signed the executive order Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thousands of Ukrainians protest against Zelenskyy’s firing of defence minister
top_signals.summary: Deputy air force commander resigns as president faces backlash over decision

top_signals.title: Takaichi Cabinet’s approval rating slips below 50% for first time, poll finds
top_signals.summary: The proportion of respondents who did not support the Cabinet stood at 25.2%, while 25.7% had no opinion, according to the July survey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Interferry2026 Holds Annual Conference in Bangkok
top_signals.summary: Interferry has unveiled its lineup of keynote speakers and ferry leaders for its upcoming annual conference. Running from October 31 to November 4, 2026, in Bangkok, Thailand, the event centers on the pivotal theme “Stronger than Ever… Together.”…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
